__PIXEL_SIGIL_ISA_REIFICATION_ULTIMA__.Compiler_JS: async function compileSigil(artifact) { const str = JSON.stringify(artifact); const bytes = new TextEncoder().encode(str); const size = Math.ceil(Math.sqrt(bytes.length / 4)); const canvas = document.createElement("canvas"); canvas.width = canvas.height = size; const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d"); const imgData = ctx.createImageData(size, size); imgData.data.set(bytes); ctx.putImageData(imgData, 0, 0); return canvas.toDataURL("image/png"); }
